text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Fox News: US President Donald Trump says the war is “very close to over” when asked by Fox News anchor Maria Bartiromo whether the conflict has ended. He adds that if the US “pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country.” Trump says “we’re not finished” and suggests Iran “want to make a deal very badly.” @wfwitness

Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers are among the assets executing a blockade mission impacting Iranian ports. The blockade is being enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or leaving coastal areas or ports in Iran. A typical destroyer has a crew of more than 300 Sailors that are highly trained in conducting offensive and defensive maritime operations." tweet

Open Source Intel Trump on Iran war: I mean, I view it as very close to over. If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country. And we're not finished. We'll see what happens. I think they want to make a deal very badly. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044217371305382221/video/1 tweet

WarMonitor This isn’t new. Back in 2016, Trump attacked Pope Francis, calling his comments “disgraceful” and accusing him of not “understanding” the U.S., showing this isn’t limited to just Pope Leo XIV. tweet
The Spectator Index US military says that no Iranian ships were allowed to pass through blockade and that '6 merchant vessels complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around'. tweet

OSINTdefender Two Iranian crude oil tankers attempting to depart the Port of Chabahar on the Gulf of Oman were intercepted by a U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer earlier today, who ordered the tankers to turn around and return to port via radio communication channels, officials tell Reuters. tweet

Open Source Intel U.S. Southern Command: "On April 14, at the direction of SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Four male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed." tweet

Faytuks News From watching this video you'd get the impression that Trump explicitly said "the war is over". What he really said, per Maria's own transcription, was: "I think it’s close to over. Yeah. I mean I view it as very close to over" 🚨 BREAKING NEWS: President Donald J. Trump speaks on the Iran conflict tomorrow on Mornings with Maria at 6AM ET. Tune in. @MariaBartiromo @FoxBusiness @POTUS @WhiteHouse https://twitter.com/MorningsMaria/status/2044165023929430217/video/1 - Mornings with Maria tweet

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance says that U.S. President Trump is presenting Iran with a grand bargain. "[Trump] said that 'if you're willing to act like a normal country, we are willing to treat you economically like a normal country.' He doesn't want a small deal. And that's that's that's one of the reasons why I won. I'd say in Pakistan, we made a ton of progress. But the reason why the deal is not yet done is because the president, he really wants a deal where Iran doesn't have a nuclear weapon, Iran is not state sponsoring terrorism, but also the people of Iran can thrive and prosper prosper and join the world economy. And that's that's the trade that he's offering. He's saying if you guys he said if you guys commit to not having a nuclear weapon, we are gonna make Iran thrive. We're gonna make it economically prosperous, and we're gonna invite the Iranian people into the world economy in a way they haven't been in my entire life. And that's the kind of Trumpian grand bargain that the president has put on the table." @wfwitness

The U.S. State Department has told Congress that Cuba may be complicit in supporting Russia’s war in Ukraine, with up to 5,000 Cuban nationals reportedly fighting on Russia’s side.
